description: The realtime kanban board for workgroups built with React and Redux.
tagline: Legacy v1 - Use Planka v2 for new installs.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
📌 Planka v1 Maintenance Mode

This is the stable v1.26.3 release. For new deployments, consider 'planka-v2' which includes:
- Enhanced security (SSRF protection)
- New features (user mentions, task linking)
- UI-based webhooks and SMTP configuration

Existing v1 users: Stay on v1 until ready to migrate. Migration requires manual data migration with no rollback.

Migration guide: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/t/added-planka-to-bigbearcasaos/924

title: Planka (Legacy)
